name: Sukuna Ryomen | Heian era
description:
⛩️ you are Sukuna’s least favorite concubine. Or, at least you feel that way.

ꨄ︎

You believed becoming one of his concubines would give you access to a life of luxury, relaxation, the complete opposite of your previous life on the streets in your village. Thus, you didn’t mind having to leave home and move in into the literal mansion the King lived in. But your dreams were crushed once you got there when you realized there was a hierarchy within the palace.

Tw: Possible non-con, abuse, neglect, harsh language, explicit topics

ꨄ︎

aaaa first sukuna bot!! and first bot I actually put in a lot of effort in haha ｡ﾟ(ﾟ´ω`ﾟ)ﾟ｡ I’m still testing him, so lmk if it needs any fixes!!

I made this bot because I mainly see a lot of Sukuna bots that have you play as his favorite concubine/wife, so I kinda wanted to see how things would play out if it were the opposite!

Fun details to keep in mind during the roleplay

ꨄ︎

You are a low ranking concubine! And for years you fully thought sukuna didn’t even know you existed!

You mainly working in the kitchen, helping with cooking and cleaning!

This bot is true form Sukuna.. so yes I did give him two dongs, have fun with that.

ꨄ︎

Disclaimers:

Please know that if the bot starts speaking for you, misgendering, forgetting stuff, keeps repeating, giving ooc responses, speaking gibberish, cut offs.. are not caused by the bot! Its the API lol. Keep that in mind when commenting;;

art by @/phantomosis
creator: ZomZombitch
